Description: Patient age at start of measurement year
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Age = measurement_year_start - date_of_birth. Use member enrollment file DOB.
Sex from enrollment demographics. M=1, F=0.
Sex from enrollment demographics. M=0, F=1.
Member has both Medicare and Medicaid coverage. Flag from CMS Monthly Membership Report (MMR).
Part D Low-Income Subsidy recipient. Impacts cost-sharing for medication adherence measures.
Enrolled in a Special Needs Plan (C-SNP, D-SNP, or I-SNP).
Last recorded systolic BP. Pull from most recent vitals encounter. ICD-10 screening: Z13.6.
Last recorded diastolic BP from same encounter as systolic.
Last HbA1c lab result. Look back 12 months. <8.0 = controlled for HBD measure.
Last recorded BMI from vitals or calculated from height/weight.
CKD stage from problem list or eGFR lab. Stage 0=no CKD.
Most recent PHQ-9 score. 0-27 scale. >=10 indicates moderate depression.
Active diagnosis on problem list or 2+ claims with DM ICD-10 in 24 months.
Active diagnosis. Essential hypertension or hypertensive heart disease.
Active diagnosis. Pure hypercholesterolemia, mixed, or unspecified.
Active diagnosis. Major depressive disorder, persistent depressive disorder.
Active CKD diagnosis stage 1-5 or ESRD.
Active CHD/CAD/IHD. Atherosclerotic heart disease, angina, prior MI.
Active chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
Active heart failure diagnosis.
PDC = days supply covered / days in measurement period. Pull from Part D PDE claims. Adherent >= 0.80.
Source Codes / Systems: NDC class: HMG-CoA reductase inhibitors (statins). GPI: 3940xx

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: PDC for ACE/ARB class. Relevant for MRA measure.
Source Codes / Systems: NDC class: ACE inhibitors, ARBs. GPI: 3610xx, 3615xx

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: PDC for oral antidiabetic agents. Includes metformin, sulfonylureas, DPP-4i, SGLT2i, etc.
PDC for antidepressant medications. SSRIs, SNRIs, tricyclics, etc.
No colonoscopy in 10yr, FIT in 1yr, or Cologuard in 3yr for age 45-75.
No mammogram in 2 years for females age 50-74.

Description: Eye Exam for Diabetes gap open
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: No retinal eye exam in measurement year for patients with diabetes.
No Tdap/Td vaccination on record per ACIP schedule.
No PCV20 or PCV15+PPSV23 per ACIP for age 65+.
No Shingrix (recombinant zoster) for age 50+.
No flu vaccine in current flu season (Aug 1 - Mar 31).
Most recent BP not at goal (<140/90) for patients with hypertension.
Source Codes / Systems: CPT: 99213-99215 + BP vitals; HEDIS CBP value set

Description: BP Control for Diabetes gap open
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Most recent BP not at goal (<140/90) for patients with diabetes.
Source Codes / Systems: Same as CBP but denominator requires diabetes dx

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Most recent A1C >= 8.0 for patients with diabetes.
No eGFR and uACR test in measurement year for diabetes patients.
Statin PDC < 80% for patients with cardiovascular disease.
Source Codes / Systems: PDE claims, statin NDCs, PDC calculation

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: ACE/ARB PDC < 80% for patients with diabetes + hypertension.
Source Codes / Systems: PDE claims, ACE/ARB NDCs, PDC calculation

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Statin PDC < 80% for patients with diabetes age 40-75.
Source Codes / Systems: PDE claims, statin NDCs, PDC calculation

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: No follow-up within 30 days of positive depression screen.
PHQ-9 not below 5 within 12 months of depression dx.
Antidepressant PDC < 80% in acute/continuation phase.
Source Codes / Systems: PDE claims, antidepressant NDCs, 84-day acute / 180-day continuation

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: No medication reconciliation within 30 days of hospital discharge.
Predictive model score. Train on historical admissions. Features: prior admits, LOS, comorbidity index.
Source Codes / Systems: HCC risk model, CMS readmission flags

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Predictive model. Features: satisfaction surveys, grievances, plan tenure, benefit changes.
Predictive model. Features: PDC history, missed appts, ED visits for chronic conditions.
Weighted sum: HCC risk score + ED visits(6mo) + IP admits(12mo) + chronic count. Scale 0-5.
Source Codes / Systems: CMS HCC risk score, utilization claims

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Member has opt-in SMS consent in CRM. Check consent table, must not be revoked.
Non-bounced email in contact database. Validated within 90 days.
Member has active portal account with login in last 180 days.
Member has app installed with push notifications enabled.
Derived: demographics.age >= 50. CMS COL eligible starting age 45, but higher priority at 50+.
Any colonoscopy claim in last 10 years. If yes, gap may still be open if >10yr ago.
Derived: demographics.sex == 'F'. BCS only applies to females.
Any mammogram claim in last 2 years.
Derived: conditions.diabetes == True. EED requires diabetes diagnosis.

Description: Years since last retinal eye exam
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Count years since last eye exam claim. 0=this year, 3+=very overdue.
Derived: demographics.age >= 65. Older adults at higher risk.
Any flu vaccine claim in prior flu season (Aug-Mar).
Count of active conditions from the 8 condition flags. More conditions = higher priority.
Same as FVA prior flu vaccine.
Derived: demographics.age >= 65. Shingrix recommended 50+ but higher priority 65+.
Any PCV or PPSV23 claim on record.
Active immunocompromising condition: HIV, transplant, chemo, immunosuppressants.
Source Codes / Systems: ICD-10: B20, Z94.x, Z51.1x; NDC: immunosuppressant drugs

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same as FVA prior flu vaccine.
Derived: conditions.hypertension == True. CBP denominator requires HTN dx.
Derived: bp_systolic < 140. Indicates whether gap is close to closing.
Derived: conditions.diabetes AND conditions.hypertension. BPD denominator.
Same as CBP bp_controlled.
Derived: conditions.diabetes == True. HBD denominator.
Derived: clinical.a1c_last < 8.0. Indicates how close to closing gap.
Derived: conditions.ckd == True.
Derived: conditions.diabetes == True. KED denominator requires diabetes.
Derived: max(conditions.chd, conditions.hyperlipidemia). MAC denominator.
Derived: medication_fill_rates.statin >= 0.80. Gap closes when adherent.
Derived: min(conditions.diabetes, conditions.hypertension). MRA denominator.
Derived: medication_fill_rates.ace_arb >= 0.80. Gap closes when adherent.
Derived: min(conditions.diabetes, conditions.hyperlipidemia). MDS denominator.
Derived: medication_fill_rates.statin >= 0.80. Gap closes when adherent.
Derived: conditions.depression == True.
Any behavioral health visit in last 90 days. Indicates patient engagement with MH services.
Derived: conditions.depression == True.
Derived: medication_fill_rates.antidepressant > 0. Active fills indicate treatment.
Derived: conditions.diabetes == True.
Same as EED years_since_eye_exam.
Any inpatient discharge within 30 days. Check IP claims with discharge date.
Active PCP assignment in member roster. Critical for transitions of care.
Source Codes / Systems: Provider roster, PCP_NPI is not null

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Total remaining message budget / total allocated. Allocated = AVG_MESSAGES_PER_PATIENT * cohort_size.
1 minus budget_remaining_norm. Indicates overall program spend.
1.0 if budget_remaining_norm < 0.25. Signal to be more selective.
1.0 if budget_remaining_norm < 0.10. Signal to severely restrict outreach.
Daily average = total_used / days_elapsed. Compare to budget/365. >1 = overspending.
At current burn rate, how many days until budget runs out. budget_remaining / daily_spend / 365.
Cyclical encoding of measurement year day (1-365). Captures seasonality.
Second component of cyclical encoding.
Linear progress through measurement year. 0.0 = Jan 1, 1.0 = Dec 31. Captures urgency.
Count of currently enrolled MA members in the cohort. Normalize by 10K.
Mean messages across all patients divided by expected per-patient budget. >1 = above plan.
Weighted average of per-measure star ratings using CMS weights. Compute from closure rates.
current_stars - stars_7_days_ago. Positive = improving. Store daily STARS in metrics table.
Count measures with individual star rating >= 4.0 / total measures.
Min star rating across all 18 measures. Identifies bottleneck.
Over last 30 days: SMS actions reaching ACCEPTED or COMPLETED state / total SMS actions sent.
Source Codes / Systems: State machine: COUNT(sms, state IN (ACCEPTED,COMPLETED)) / COUNT(sms, all)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same calculation for email channel.
Same calculation for portal channel.
Same calculation for app channel.
Same calculation for IVR channel.
Count all outreach messages sent to this patient in current quarter. Normalize by expected per-patient.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach platform: COUNT(messages WHERE patient_id = X)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Ratio of this patient's message count to cohort average. >1 = getting more than average attention.
Count messages sent to this patient in last 7 calendar days. Used for suppression logic.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: COUNT(messages WHERE patient_id=X AND date >= today-7)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Count messages in last 14 days. Captures medium-term contact fatigue.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: COUNT(messages WHERE date >= today-14)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Count messages in last 30 days. Captures monthly contact saturation.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: COUNT(messages WHERE date >= today-30)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Calendar days since the most recent message was sent. Capped at 90.
Total patient engagements (clicked, accepted, completed) / total messages sent. All channels combined.
Source Codes / Systems: State machine: COUNT(ACCEPTED+COMPLETED) / COUNT(all) for this patient

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Count of distinct channels (sms, email, portal, app, ivr) used for this patient. Divided by 5.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: COUNT(DISTINCT channel WHERE patient_id = X)

Description: SMS success rate for this patient
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Patient-specific: SMS messages reaching ACCEPTED/COMPLETED / total SMS sent to this patient.
Source Codes / Systems: State machine filtered by patient_id + channel='sms'

Description: Email success rate for this patient
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same for email.

Description: Portal success rate for this patient
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same for portal.

Description: App success rate for this patient
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same for app.

Description: IVR success rate for this patient
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same for IVR.
Baseline SMS engagement from historical data (pre-simulation). Updated during simulation.
Baseline email open rate from historical tracking pixel data.
Baseline portal click-through/action rate from portal analytics.
Baseline app interaction rate from mobile analytics.
Baseline IVR call completion (not hung up) rate.
Count of currently open gaps for this patient. More gaps = more opportunity.
Mean days since each open gap was first identified. Older gaps may be harder to close.
Days since this patient's most recent gap closure. 90 = no recent closures.

Description: CMS weight of top open gap
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Max MEASURE_WEIGHTS value among open gaps. 3=outcome measure, 1=process measure.
Source Codes / Systems: Derived: MAX(MEASURE_WEIGHTS[g] for g in open_gaps)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Gaps already closed this measurement year. Indicates overall patient engagement.
Count of actions in non-terminal state machine states (CREATED, QUEUED, PRESENTED, VIEWED).
Source Codes / Systems: State machine: COUNT(WHERE patient_id=X AND state NOT IN terminal_states)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Count distinct measures among pending actions. Avoids re-targeting same measure.
Source Codes / Systems: State machine: COUNT(DISTINCT measure WHERE pending)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: 1.0 if num_pending_actions > 0. Quick check for active outreach.
Measure index of the most recently sent action. 0-17 mapped to HEDIS_MEASURES order.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: most recent action's measure

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Channel index: 0=sms, 1=email, 2=portal, 3=app, 4=ivr.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: most recent action's channel

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same as above for 2nd most recent action.
Channel of 2nd most recent action.
3rd most recent.
3rd most recent.
4th most recent.
4th most recent.
5th most recent.
5th most recent.

Description: Top gap: days since last attempt
Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: For the highest-priority open gap: days since last outreach targeting this measure.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: DATEDIFF(today, MAX(send_date WHERE measure=X))

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Total outreach attempts for this measure for this patient this year.
Source Codes / Systems: Outreach log: COUNT(WHERE measure=X AND patient_id=Y)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Same for 2nd priority gap.
Same for 2nd priority gap.
Same for 3rd priority gap.
Same for 3rd priority gap.
Same for 4th priority gap.
Same for 4th priority gap.
Same for 5th priority gap.
Same for 5th priority gap.
Measure index of highest-priority open gap (ranked by CMS weight then gap age).
Source Codes / Systems: Derived: sort open_gaps by weight DESC, age DESC

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Total outreach attempts for this top priority measure.
Channel with highest success rate for this measure for this patient.
Source Codes / Systems: State machine: argmax(success_rate by channel for this measure)

Clinical Definition / Extraction Logic: Days since last attempt at this priority gap.
Same for 2nd priority gap.
Same for 2nd priority.
Same for 2nd priority.
Same for 2nd priority.
Same for 3rd priority gap.
Same for 3rd priority.
